title: Ultimate rat
description: Private Rat texture pack for own use
body: This resource pack adds a rat instead of the totem of undying and wooden, stone, iron, diamond and netherite swords and axes. The pack only replaces the item textures and does not change the sounds. The textures are created for Minecraft version 1.20.1. The textures are created only for entertainment and humorous purposes without trying to offend the feelings of any rat, mouse or cat.
